_comment: Hand-authored cassette mirroring a real claude-opus-4-8 gloss response for the equation g_s = A/(c_a - c_i). Used by the offline contract test for adapters/anthropic_llm.py so complete()'s request shape and response mapping are verified without networking.

content.text: Stomatal conductance equals the assimilation rate divided by the difference between the ambient and internal carbon dioxide concentrations.
